OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: DFDFW Create Draft Service Application

omniProcessElements.name: checkIndvlApplnExist
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "instanceId" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%oldInstanceId%),%oldInstanceId%,IF(ISNOTBLANK(%instanceId%),%instanceId%,IF(ISNOTBLANK(%currentInstanceId%),%currentInstanceId%,%sInstanceId%)))" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetExistingServiceApplicationRecord", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: createIndvlApplnRecord
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "instanceId" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%instanceId%),%instanceId%,IF(ISNOTBLANK(%sInstanceId%),%sInstanceId%,\"\"))", "individualApplicationId" : "=%checkIndvlApplnExist:IndividualApplication:Id%", "applicationStatus" : "=%checkIndvlApplnExist:IndividualApplication:Status%", "omniInput:ContextId" : "=%checkIndvlApplnExist:IndividualApplication:Id%", "omniInput:MainAccountId" : "=%checkIndvlApplnExist:MainAccountId%", "omniInput:accountEmail" : "=%checkIndvlApplnExist:accountEmail%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "Service_Application_Detail__c_1:Id", "responseJSONNode" : "IndividualApplicationId", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "omniInput", "bundle" : "DFDFWCreateServiceApplicationForLoggedInUser", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: extractIndvlAppln
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "" : "" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DFDFWGetServiceApplication", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "IndividualApplicationId", "element" : "IndividualApplicationId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
